channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Inflation rises in US amid Iran war, Hormuz blockade
item.description: Government report shows gasoline going up by 21.2 percent in March as petrol remains above $4 per gallon despite truce.

item.title: Zelenskyy says Ukrainian interceptors downed Iran drones in the Middle East
item.description: Ukraine's Zelenskyy previously announced that 228 Ukrainian experts had been deployed to the region.

item.title: Pakistan sets modest goal for US-Iran summit: A deal to keep talks going
item.description: US-Iran talks open in Islamabad with mediators focused on keeping dialogue alive amid deep divisions.

item.title: Vance expects ‘positive’ Iran talks as he heads to Islamabad
item.description: US VP JD Vance says Trump gave “clear guidelines” for Iran talks in Pakistan and expects “positive” negotiations.

item.title: Russia suffers ‘record’ soldier casualties as Ukraine ups drone production
item.description: Russian casualties are mounting, recruitment is falling and territorial gains are dwindling.

item.title: Gaza father searches for his children’s remains in the rubble for years
item.description: A father in the Al Bureij camp in Gaza survived an Israeli airstrike but four of his children died.

item.title: ‘Closer to a break than ever’: Can NATO survive if Trump pulls the US out?
item.description: The war in Iran has deepened a rift in the transatlantic alliance, raising questions about whether it can endure.

item.title: Will Israel and Lebanon start ceasefire talks?
item.description: Israel and Hezbollah continued to trade attacks on Friday - although at a reduced pace.

item.title: At least 11 killed in Israeli air strikes across southern Lebanon
item.description: World Food Programe says situation in Lebnon is 'rapidly becoming a food security crisis' amid Israeli attacks.

item.title: Six months into ‘ceasefire’, Gaza suffers under persistent Israeli attacks
item.description: Gaza's devastation grows as over 72,000 people killed and 172,000 injured amid Israeli violations of US-brokered truce.
